violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the kitchen area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025
The hot water knob located at the bar hand sink was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025

The floor in the back storage area has an accumulation of soil residue, old droppings, and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025

Observed lip-surface of beer glasses to be in direct contact with frost on freezer. Cleaned and sanitized tableware shall be handled, displayed, and dispensed so that contamination of lip-contact surfaces is prevented. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the freezer has an accumulation of frost buildup. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024
